---
title: "CognitiveRouter.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/CognitiveRouter.ts"
loc: 59
complexity: 5
logic_score: 4.17
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 6.07
overall_score: 5.10
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [IntentPayload](file://./CorvusProcess.js)
- [CorvusProcess](file://./CorvusProcess.js)
- [EventManager](file://./EventManager.js)

### Exports
- `CognitiveRouter`
- `CognitiveRouter`
- `appId`
- `requiresCore`
- `eventManager`
- `response`
- `result`
